source.sourcePath: raw/sources/DHF (인허가)/06_(Retrofit) HnX-R1/05_설계개발 검증 및 유효성 확인/11_Clinical Evaluation/Clinical Image Report/004_Clinical Image Report - G1417FW.pdf

sourceSummary.oneLine: Clinical consideration report comparing G1417FW radiographic images with F1417MCW across 30 X-ray views.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports clinical evaluation and technical documentation by documenting comparative radiographic image quality, DICOM 3.0 image acquisition, exposure conditions, and radiologist assessment.
keyPoints: Objective device is G1417FW by H&abyz; comparative equipment is F1417MCW made by H&Abyz.
Output data for communications standard DICOM 3.0 is used for downloading and analysis.
Thirty anatomical X-ray views were evaluated using S, A, B, C grading.
Total average image quality values were F1417MCW 3.99 and G1417FW 3.79.
The conclusion states F1417MCW has slightly better image quality and more diagnostic value, while the difference is not too difficult to diagnose.

reviewFlags.reason: Authority or jurisdiction is not stated in the source text; CE/MDR appears only as source metadata signal.
Document dating is ambiguous: header shows Rev. Date May/14/2022, while preparation/review/approval signatures show May/16/2025.
OCR/text quality issues are present, including misspellings such as DCIOM, Insperction, Sternal Angel, and malformed table values such as Soft Tissue ... S S4.
The title is inferred from repeated header text and attachment heading because no single formal title page title is provided.
